note: Generated by scripts/build-manifest.mjs — do not hand-edit. Run the script to refresh.

chatbot.name: ChatInlineChartReference
chatbot.summary: A chart the assistant can drop straight into a turn — same engine and token discipline as the Finance surfaces, just compact and bubble-framed.

chatbot.name: ChatToolCallReference
chatbot.summary: Collapsible tool-call blocks — the terminal-CLI tool chain (the Claude Code / opencode pattern): each call is a mono line (chevron · tool(args) · status · timing) that folds its output away.

chrome.name: AnnouncementBarReference
chrome.summary: Graphite's announcement bar: 48px above the nav, the ENTIRE bar is the link, dismissible, an a11y region.

chrome.name: TabsReference
chrome.summary: Reusable tab strip with a sliding active indicator.

controls.name: EmptyStatesReference
controls.summary: Empty / error states — the outcomes the skeleton loader resolves into when there's nothing to show: no results, a first-run blank, and a load error.

controls.name: SkeletonReference
controls.summary: Skeleton loading states — placeholder shapes with a shimmer sweep that stand in until content arrives, then swap 1:1 to the real layout.

controls.name: TagsInputReference
controls.summary: Tags / chips input — the multi-select filter.

data.name: MarqueeTickerReference
data.summary: Infinite marquee ticker — the scrolling "built on" strip common to the reference sites, in our terminal register: two mono rows drifting in opposite directions, edge-fade masks, seamless loop (content duplicated, track translated exactly -50%), and pause-on-hover.

data.name: OdometerReference
data.summary: Odometer counter — the mechanical digit-roll (Revolut's sleek counters), the companion to the count-up stat.

data.name: PricingMatrixReference
data.summary: Graphite's pricing system: grouped comparison rows, ✓/Limited/Advanced cells, an annual toggle (20% off), per-tier CTA verbs that escalate with commitment — and enterprise never shows a price.

data.name: SortableTableReference
data.summary: Sortable data table — a strategy leaderboard you can reorder by any column.

effects.name: AmbientMesh
effects.summary: Reference port of the ambient background bloom used on digithings.ai subpages (architecture / chat / modules) and, in a teal-palette variant, on digiquant.io subpages (pipeline / strategies / contact).

effects.name: ClipReveal
effects.summary: Graphite's band transition: the incoming section wipes in via a clip-path inset riding the same glide curve as everything else (~0.6s feel).

effects.name: CrossfadeSections
effects.summary: Cross-fade + parallax reveal — the softest of the three between-sections transitions mined from revolut.com.

effects.name: HeroGraphReference
effects.summary: Reveal-field hero graph — the cursor-following node web from the digithings.ai and digiquant.io landing heroes.

effects.name: PipelineReference
effects.summary: Pipeline — a workflow visualization ported from the olympus dashboard's pipeline section (frontend/olympus/components/pipeline).

effects.name: ResearchPipeline
effects.summary: Reference port of the digiquant.io landing `#pipeline` band — the scroll-assembling research → execution walkthrough.

effects.name: RotatingPrompts
effects.summary: x.ai's rotating hero teasers + cursor's codebase Q&A, translated: the prompts are REAL quant questions, and in production each one links into digichat pre-filled — the teaser is a door, not a poster.

effects.name: RoutingMap
effects.summary: Arc-flight routing map — mined from revolut.com's globe (money crossing borders), in our register: orders routing across venues.

effects.name: SectionMorph
effects.summary: Pinned zoom-morph — mined from revolut.com's between-sections transition, where a full-bleed visual scales and rounds down to dock as a card in the next section while that section's copy rises in beside it.

effects.name: StackingPanels
effects.summary: Stacking panels — the second between-sections transition mined from revolut.com.

finance.name: DrawdownPlotReference
finance.summary: Deterministic drawdown series: run an equity walk, measure % below the running peak.

finance.name: EquityCurveReference
finance.summary: Deterministic cumulative-equity walk (starts at 100, drifts up with dips).

finance.name: PerformanceDashboardReference
finance.summary: Performance dashboard — the portfolio at a glance: a value/return headline, a strip of aggregate ratios, and an allocation-by-strategy breakdown.

finance.name: PriceChartReference
finance.summary: Deterministic OHLC + volume walk so the demo looks the same every render.

finance.name: StockTickerReference
finance.summary: Stock ticker tape — the scrolling market strip, in our register.

finance.name: SyncedTearsheetReference
finance.summary: One Lightweight Charts instance, two panes sharing a single time axis: cumulative equity on top, the underwater drawdown below.

layout-patterns.name: PhoneOlympus
layout-patterns.summary: Phone mockup showcasing the olympus app — a device frame (matte bezel, dynamic-island, side buttons) wrapping a mock olympus mobile dashboard.

layout-patterns.name: ProductFrame
layout-patterns.summary: ProductFrame — the "real surface, cropped" technique mined from graphite: a product screenshot is authored once on a FIXED 800px artboard, then scaled proportionally to fit its container so it never reflows and stays pixel-faithful at any width.

shared.name: SiteNav
shared.summary: Shared top bar for the design-reference app.

symbols.name: Glyph
symbols.summary: Glyph — the interface utility symbol set, as a programmatic name → drawing registry.

symbols.name: OlympusMark
symbols.summary: Product brand marks, ported faithfully for the symbols reference page.

terminal.name: StreamTranscriptReference
terminal.summary: Streaming transcript — the digichat grammar (canon §16): `>` user turn, `▸` assistant turn, a folded tool-work chip, and a streaming caret that types the answer token by token.

typography.name: TypeSpecimen
typography.summary: Type specimen — a canonical surface for evaluating the live type suite (switch it in the nav).

typography.name: WordRevealReference
typography.summary: Timing over the pinned track: every word reaches full visibility by REVEAL_END (70% of track progress).

typography.name: WordRevealMuted
typography.summary: Same hold contract as the blur variant: done by 70%, held for the last 30%.

typography.name: WordRevealOutline
typography.summary: The closing word fills with the accent, per the house .colo-word pattern.
